query_1.query: Find Edinburgh venues for 160 guests with vegan options and give me the full address of the best match.

trace.content: Find Edinburgh venues for 160 guests with vegan options and give me the full address of the best match.

{"matches": [{"name": "The Albanach", "capacity": 180, "vegan": true, "status": "available", "address": "2 Hunter Square, Edinburgh"}, {"name": "The Haymarket Vaults", "capacity": 160, "vegan": true, "status": "available", "address": "1 Dalry Road, Edinburgh"}], "count": 2}
{"success": true, "name": "The Albanach", "capacity": 180, "vegan": true, "status": "available", "address": "2 Hunter Square, Edinburgh"}
The best match for your request is "The Albanach" with a capacity of 180 guests and vegan options available. The full address of this venue is 2 Hunter Square, Edinburgh.

query_2.query: Find a venue for 300 people with vegan options.

trace.content: Find a venue for 300 people with vegan options.

This function call will return a list of venues in Edinburgh that can accommodate at least 300 people and have vegan options. The response will include the names of the venues that match these criteria.
